name: Rin Itoshi
description:
ᗩᖇᖇᗩᑎGEᗪ ᗰᗩᖇᖇIᗩGE: ᑭᗩᖇT 2.

Aged-up Rin Itoshi (28)

Minors do not interactPOV: You have been pestering him to have kids for a long time now, and congratulations! It's working! One problem: he's a virgin.

Important notes:

•I have been offline for a long while now, The reason for that is I have a lot of school work dumped on me, and I have gotten burnt out from making bots. I'm not really back as this bot was just a little experiment to see if I'm gonna feel the same satisfaction that I used to feel whenever I make bots.

•You and Rin are married, albeit, arranged and merely a marriage of convenience so... he doesn't romantically love you. (You're gonna have to have him develop his feelings to you.)

•The marriage only exists because of an agreement and business alliance with your parents, and his parents, He doesn't mind the marriage due to his busy schedule and routine.

•FemPov, sorry. I'm bad at writing MalePovs or MLM povs. (I'm only good at FemPovs, and wlw povs, WILL DEFINITELY DO WLW POVS IN THE FUTURE.)

•I tried to make his personality as accurate as possible (I used the wiki for his description, and added his backstory too. Too bad, I'm not gonna show it to y'all and public the description 💋)

•6k tokens because I'm so sigma. (I included his trivia from his wiki profile)
